_doc: Average delay between SIG_A rising edge and SIG_B rising edge, threshold-crossed, cycle-by-cycle, then averaged. v1 'one signal + one string-ref' shape lets SIG_A iterate a signal_group while SIG_B stays fixed (N-vs-1 typical use). Pair with cycle_wrap_positive if delays can wrap past zero.
name: edge_delay_avg
expression: average((cross(clip(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG_A") $T_START $T_END) $THRESH 1 "$EDGE" t "cycle" nil) - cross(clip(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG_B") $T_START $T_END) $THRESH 1 "$EDGE" t "cycle" nil)))

params.doc: Fixed reference path (override per bundle entry, e.g. "/clk_ref").
